title: Preparation of Chemically competent Agrbacterium cells
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"okh0","text":"Preparation of chemically competent Agrobacterium cells using calcium chloride","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"4qk23","text":"Composition of YEM medium (1 Lt)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":32}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1meg8","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7tupo","text":"✔️Mannitol 10 g","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"73etn","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"evvb5","text":"✔️Yeast extract 0.4 g","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8g8bq","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"d2plh","text":"✔️NaCl 0.1 g","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3r3tu","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"49klt","text":"✔️MgSO4, 7H2O 0.02 g","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3t6hs","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dnm01","text":"✔️0.5% K2HPO4 10 ml (prepare separately with autoclaved water, filter sterilize and add at the time of pouring plate)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3op17","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"agu6c","text":"✔️Agar 15g","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Streak Agrobacterium strain on YEM plate containing rifampicin (stock 20 mg/ml; dissolve in methanol). Grow at 28 C for 48 hrs.
Inoculate single colony in 5 ml YEM + Rif. And grow at 28 C for 12-16 hours
Inoculate 2 ml culture to 50 ml YEM + Rif in a 250 ml flask and shake vigorously (250 rpm) at 28 C until culture grows to an OD600 of 0.5-1.0 (5-6 hrs)
Chill the culture on ice. Centrifuge cell suspension at 3000 xg for 5 min at 4 C.
Resuspend cells in 1 ml of 20 mM CaCl2 (0.03 g CaCl2 in 10 ml autoclaved water, filter). Centrifuge at 300 xg for 5 min at 4 C. Discard supernatant.
Resuspend pellet in 1 ml of 20 mM CaCl2. Dispense 0.1 ml of aliquots into prechilled EP tubes. Freeze in liquid nitrogen and store at -80 C.
creator: Velu Mani Selvaraj
